data.title: Epic: Migrate dot-skogai → .skogai/
data.description:
Consolidate `SkogAI/dot-skogai` into the `.skogai/` folder of `SkogAI/claude`. The dot-skogai repo is being deprecated — all its structure, scripts, and skills move here.

## Context

dot-skogai was a standalone repo for shared SkogAI agent infrastructure. The skogfences principle says agents are unix users — their shared infrastructure belongs in their shared home, not a separate repo. `.skogai/` in `SkogAI/claude` is that home.

## Sub-tasks

* [SKOGAI.md](<http://SKOGAI.md>) — root context router
* knowledge/ — decisions, learnings, patterns
* memory/ — session context and decision log
* plan/ — project planning structure
* tasks/ — local task tracking
* templates/ — starter templates for new content
* scripts/context/ — context generation scripts
* scripts/bootstrap/ — init and symlink setup
* email/ — skogai inter-agent messaging (inbox/outbox)
* workflows/ — automation definitions and action lists
* bin/ — shared executables for agent home
* skills/ — shared agent skills registry

## Repo

`SkogAI/claude` (`.skogai/` folder)
